A self-hosted Markdown knowledge vault — see the docs.

t11z.github.io/engram

Engram

Engram is a self-hosted Markdown knowledge vault. Your notes are ordinary files on disk that you can read, search, back up, and move with everyday tools, whether or not the server happens to be running at the time.

Why plain files

Because the storage format is just text, the data outlives the tool that produced it. A note written today can still be opened decades from now, long after this particular application has been forgotten, which is exactly what a durable archive needs.

About Pricing Contact
